programme.title: Flooded Forest
programme.desc: One in ten species live in the Amazon, where its size, diversity, and annual flooding create relationships.

programme.title: Follow Your Cat
programme.desc: With a scientist that specializes in cats and modern technology we follow the cat on their wild wanderings.

programme.title: You, Planet
programme.desc: An unknown yet familiar planet, this alien world is not from space – it’s you.

programme.title: Wondrous & Wild
programme.desc: A glimpse at the marvelous life on Earth, from births to deaths, joy to danger, day to night.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 1
programme.desc: In summer, the Glade is a paradise in Ruaha's dry plains, always providing water and sparking relationships.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 2
programme.desc: As the dry continues in Ruaha, herds of elephants arrive in the Glade.

programme.title: The Lions Rule - Part 3
programme.desc: Cubs grow quickly, learning to hunt, until one young lion begins to change, disrupting life in the Glade.

programme.title: Wonders Of Africa: What A Difference A Day Makes
programme.desc: In Africa, where giants roam and predators hunt, every day brings wonders, life, and death.

programme.title: Wild Ways of the Coast
programme.desc: Many dream of sandy beaches, palm-lined inlets, and marine life thriving across coasts and mangroves.

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: At first sight, our atmosphere seems empty. But this mantle of air is a habitat for life in its own right.

programme.title: Land
programme.desc: Viewed from space, our blue planet seems so familiar that we forget how extraordinary it is.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: The oceans act as a driving force for local weather phenomena and global climate change.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Apes, Dogs
programme.desc: Four small leopards are born, while the wild dog pack has managed to dig their way to the monkeys.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Leopard, Wild Dog
programme.desc: Schalk brings a litter of wild dogs to Harnas, and for caracal Tammy a new chapter is about to start.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Lizard, Leopard
programme.desc: A monitor lizard has made himself comfortable between 19 wild cheetahs.

programme.title: Wildlife Rescue - Leopard
programme.desc: One of seven cheetahs living in the enclosure near the built-up area of the farm is about to be released.

programme.title: Practice makes perfect
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson moves 27 lions and 14 hyenas, facing challenges with reluctant animals and permits.

programme.title: Precious Cargo
programme.desc: Kevin fights to relocate lions and hyenas, forming a new pride while managing hyena tensions.

programme.title: Leap Of The Lynx
programme.desc: Until five years ago, both populations of Iberian lynx were quickly fading away.

programme.title: King of the Seas - Sea Eagle
programme.desc: Germany’s Sea eagles thrive by stealing food from sea ravens, showcasing their expert poaching skills.

programme.title: King of the Mountains - Golden Eagle
programme.desc: Witness Golden eagles in aerial views, showcasing their majestic flights, and hunting skills.

programme.title: Smart and Smarter
programme.desc: Navigation without a map? No problem. Building a fortress out of living bodies? Check.

programme.title: The Art of Seduction
programme.desc: Life is filled with magical moments. Some are extra-special.

programme.title: Masters of Disguise
programme.desc: Size is no obstacle for these wild magicians, from tiny insects to the mega-mammals of the African plains.

programme.title: The Far East
programme.desc: The Amur's coastal delta is one of the richest ecosystems on earth.

programme.title: The Black Dragon
programme.desc: The Amur, or Heilong-jian, winds through Manchuria, forming a natural border between China and Russia.

programme.title: The Secret Springs
programme.desc: Follow Mongolian gazelles, nomads, and wildlife: eagles, wolves, marmots, and more in vast wilderness.

programme.title: The Loco-motion Picture
programme.desc: Watch how animals move differently, exploring nature's ways to keep creatures alive and in motion.

programme.title: The Witness is a Whale
programme.desc: The whales are the witnesses to a past of giants and also to an untold history: the clues are everywhere.

programme.title: Under Cover - Every Body Needs a Coat
programme.desc: From fur to feathers, from scales to shells – every creature has some form of characteristic outer layer.

programme.title: Carnivorous Plants
programme.desc: Scientists have recently shown that many more plants than we had ever thought are carnivorous.

programme.title: Orchids
programme.desc: Orchids produce thousands of seeds, which are so small that they contain no food reserves.

programme.title: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: What has happened to evolution? The answer is very simple: us.

programme.title: Tall & Tiny - Nature's Extremes
programme.desc: Tremendously tall – or ridiculously small: nature never ceases to surprise.

programme.title: Wildlife in the Cantabrian Mountains - Part 1
programme.desc: The Cantabrian Mountains reveal wildlife like bears and wolves, showcasing survival in harsh climates.

programme.title: Wildlife in the Cantabrian Mountains - Part 2
programme.desc: Discover the hidden Cantabrian Mountains, home to bears, wolves, and capercaillies, thriving in nature.

programme.title: Wales - Spirit of the Dragon
programme.desc: Wales, with its peaks, forests, and shores, may be small but rivals the wild wealth of any land.

programme.title: Wild Cornwall: Out On The Edge
programme.desc: Cornwall, once a haven for smugglers and pirates, has never truly been uninhabited.

programme.title: Baboon, Cheetah, Bush Baby
programme.desc: How will an orphaned baby baboon respond when meeting a fellow baboon at an emergency wildlife center?

programme.title: Rhino, Hyrax, Porcupine
programme.desc: Every day a monitoring team at Somkhanda Game Reserve keeps track of a rhino and her calf.

programme.title: Elephant, Chimpanzee, Wildebeest
programme.desc: We visit the animal carers of Lilayi Elephant Nursery in Zambia and the Mefou Primate Park in Cameroon.

programme.title: Wild Dog, Baboon, Antelope
programme.desc: Rehabilitating and teaching young wild dog packs to hunt is a goal of Erindi Private Game Reserve in Namibia.

programme.title: White Beauty - A Stallion's Life
programme.desc: The Lipizzaner are famous around the world. A documentary about the history of the oldest horse breed.

programme.title: Wet & Dry
programme.desc: Discover the fascinating solutions that animals have developed to thrive in extreme habitats around the world.

programme.title: Hot & Cold
programme.desc: From the poles to the tropics, from desert to swamp, from mountain peaks to ocean depths.

programme.title: High & Low
programme.desc: The highest and the lowest places of our planet also offer niches where life thrives.

programme.title: What a Colourful World
programme.desc: A global journey to discover the colourful creatures that make our world wonderfully diverse.

programme.title: Strandwolf
programme.desc: This is the story of Tosca, a long-haired, primeval-looking brown hyena.

programme.title: Planet Parrot
programme.desc: Alien invaders, like colourful parrots, thrive in cities, outsmarting species and making urban life their own.

programme.title: Ostrich: A Life On The Run
programme.desc: This bird is something special: it can neither sing nor fly – but it is able to run at a speed of 70 km/h.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen Of The North
programme.desc: The snowy owl glares across the tundra with all-knowing eyes – these owls seem to capture our imagination

programme.title: Bird Brain
programme.desc: It’s used as an insult – ‘bird brain’ – not bright. But new research suggests that this may no longer apply.

programme.title: Between Worlds - Part 2
programme.desc: Tarahumara and Woodabe: isolated lives, autonomous families, and nomadic traditions endure unchanged.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E01 - Naturally Breathtaking
programme.desc: Do you know where in the world the last untouched glacier is? Where is the highest and the smallest waterfall? Which desert is the driest or the largest? Would you like to know where the most inaccessible mountains, the lowest point of the oceans or the great salt deserts are? This series offers all the answers.In the first episode, we discover breathtaking glaciers in Argentina, infinite plane in the middle of Europe, thermal miracles of Hungary, stalactite caves protected by UNESCO and the most active volcano in New Zealand – White island.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E02 - Naturally Dramatic
programme.desc: This episode describes the greatest miracle of nature that could be created by the human brain. The Loch Ness monster. It looks that is does not exist but thousands of visitors still come to see the lovely lake and to hear tales about it. Not only Nessi, but the Scottish high lands are the miracle of nature.Then we quickly visit Andalusia and remove our hat in front of the majestic mountains of Sierra Nevada.The deepest lake in the world is found in Siberia. We will talk about Baikal, the natural miracle of Russia.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E03 - Naturally Diverse
programme.desc: The episode focuses on the Arabian peninsula. The endless red desert in Oman contrasts with Yemen ́s island of Socotra. The endemic crabs from Socotra compete with sea turtles who gather on a single beach in Oman to lay their eggs. And, it is also claimed that the petrified rock formation is of Noah's Ark.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S03:E08 - Mountain Lion Part 1
programme.desc: Laramy sets the dogs loose after mountain lions, but wolves may pose a threat to his pups.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S03:E09 - Mountain Lion Part 2
programme.desc: Laramy continues his hunt for a massive mountain lion.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S03:E10 - Bear Part 1
programme.desc: Laramy hikes the steep Rockies in search of Black Bear.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S03:E11 - Bear Part 2
programme.desc: Laramy continues his hunt for Black Bear in the steep springtime Rockies.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E03 - Bear In Focus
programme.desc: A group of conservationists are observing a family of black bears in the wooded hills of Oklahoma, and Ivan gets to meet them.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E05 - Extreme Conditions
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and study Whitetail Deer in the frigid South Dakotan winter.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E06 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E02 - White Gold
programme.desc: Ivan Carter works to save a key elephant from ivory poachers near Africa's famous Kruger National Park.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E13 - Who is the King?
programme.desc: It is estimated that there are approximately 8.7 million different species of animals on Earth. Each has developed unique, specific and often deadly survival techniques and skills for survival. How do we choose a favourite from such a vast array of spectacular and beautiful creatures?

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E01 - Naturally Breathtaking

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E05 - Hunger Pains
programme.desc: Symptoms of starvation have set in for Chris and Casey, who haven’t eaten in days. When they cross paths with a grouse, the unexpected happens. Frustration peaks as the temperatures drop. The brothers set up a new camp, but will it help the hunt?

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E06 - White Out
programme.desc: With still no big game in sight, Chris and Casey are forced to rely on fishing for food. The cold temperatures have slowed down the fish, creating challenges. When Mother Nature brings a brutal snow storm, the brothers are tested likenever before.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E08 - Fun In The Sun
programme.desc: When jet skis get too close to boats things can turn dangerous. And Warden Bryan Golie questions an angler in search for the truth.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E09 - Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Wardens often go the extra mile to investigate a report of illegal activity, help a hunter or protect landowner rights. This week wardens go that extra mile with an unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E07 - Motherly Love
programme.desc: After weeks of trying to survive in Saskatchewan, Chris and Casey have yet to kill big game. Time is running out as the bear begin to hibernate. Mental willpower is wearing thin. But a message from back home changes everything.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E08 - Refuelled
programme.desc: A turn of events lifts the brothers’ spirits, but creates a huge hurdle they must overcome as they enter a new race against the clock.Chris and Casey reflect on the challenges they have faced so far, and the challenges that still lie ahead.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E10 - Thrill Kill
programme.desc: In 2012, the small community of Whitefish, Montana was shocked by the senseless killing of over 20 deer. Region 1 Wardens think outside the box to put a stop to this heinous crime.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E11 - Invasive Species
programme.desc: Protecting Montana Waters from Aquatic Invasive Species is a top priority for Montana FWP. But when AIS check stations are set up in Region 1 and 3 it's up to the Wardens to educate the public.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E06 - Training Day
programme.desc: Island Air is the lifeline to many in Kodiak. Sometimes the violent weather prevents the planes from landing so Erik takes the day to teach Pete how to use the camera hatch for a little target practice.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E07 - Surf's Up
programme.desc: Rough seas have a couple of surfers turning to Island Air for an adventure of a life time.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:05 - 3 in 1 Day

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E06 - Bombs Away
programme.desc: Jamie puts his trust in The New explosives technology to keep ski slopes safe and the local highways open all winter. But his barrage of anti-avalanche bombs is not enough to save everyone.

programme.desc: Stormhunters Mark and Jaclyn visit Canada's Arctic to see how the inhabitants live. Jaclyn also hopes to achieve one of her lifelong goals; to come face to face with a polar bear. Will she be able to cross this off her bucket list?

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Will perilous conditions put the Stormhunters in the line of danger as the violent storm spins out of control?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Due sospetti che convivono sono stati collegati a un omicidio per stivali macchiati di sangue e una pistola.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Tiffany Rowell e tre dei suoi amici furono brutalmente assassinati nel loro ricco quartiere di Clear Lake, in Texas, e la scena del crimine fornì poche prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un'auto crivellata di colpi, un autista scomparso e nessun testimone. Fu un agguato o un attacco casuale?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, l'immobiliarista del Colorado Alan Helmick fu trovato colpito a morte a casa della moglie Miriam, che diventò quindi la principale sospettata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria risulta scomparsa, la polizia crede che l'indagine sarà come tante altre. Ma quando scoprono schizzi di sangue nella camera da letto del suo ragazzo, capiscono che questo caso sarà diverso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane donna frequenta le funzioni religiose serali... poi scompare. Quando la sua auto abbandonata viene ritrovata, il serbatoio è vuoto e manca una tanica di benzina che teneva nel bagagliaio per le emergenze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2005, David Castor subì una morte lenta e straziante nell'arco di giorni. Sua moglie Stacey sosteneva che si trattasse di suicidio, anche se era stato eseguito con l'antigelo.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, l'immobiliarista texana Sarah Anne Walker fu trovata brutalmente uccisa in una casa modello. Settimane dopo si presentò un testimone che forse vide il killer. La polizia usò l'ipnosi forense per fargli evocare i dettagli fisici dell'uomo.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un chirurgo viene colpito a morte e il sospettato principale viene visto al ristorante al momento del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, Ken, il marito di Kristine Fitzhugh, la trovò morta in fondo alle scale della loro casa a Palo Alto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Dorothy Donovan fu assassinata nella sua casa a Dover, Delaware e la polizia era scettica quando suo figlio Charles Holden dichiarò che era stata uccisa da un autostoppista a cui lui aveva dato un passaggio.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una madre single viene rapita in una stazione di servizio e trovata morta vicino a un pozzo di petrolio. I detective usano le impronte delle scarpe e dei pneumatici per escludere vari sospettati e trovare l'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane famiglia viene uccisa, i detective devono decifrare le minacce scritte sulla scena del crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una piccola comunità è scioccata quando una donna viene colpita e uccisa in una chiesa. La polizia ha poche prove e nessun sospetto.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Il caso di una giovane donna assassinata in Wisconsin rimane irrisolto per quasi trent'anni. Ma le analisi forensi di un altro crimine forniscono nuovi dettagli.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un serial killer è in fuga da vent'anni. Quando viene arrestato, la polizia fa una scoperta inaspettata.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Quando una studentessa di Yale sparisce misteriosamente alcuni giorni prima del suo matrimonio, gli investigatori perlustrano un laboratorio di ricerca alla ricerca di prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un appassionato di crimine collega una sconosciuta dello Utah a un caso di persone scomparse dell'Ohio.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: In California, il DNA di un uomo innocente viene trovato sulla scena di una fatale irruzione in casa.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Dopo che due operai sono stati uccisi in un cantiere, la polizia si concentra su un indizio importante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, in Illinois i soccorsi giunsero in un incendio in un box e videro un uomo compresso sotto un camion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: I medici non sanno perché il giovane scienziato sia gravemente malato. Quando i test rivelano finalmente la causa, è troppo tardi per salvarlo. La polizia spera che l'analisi di laboratorio dei suoi capelli conduca all'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La polizia di Seattle non aveva sospetti per il brutale delitto della cantante post-grunge Mia Zapata. Passò più di un decennio prima che gli scienziati forensi potessero usare le prove raccolte da un sagace patologo per identificare l'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Indagando su un brutale omicidio, la scientifica aveva chiara una cosa: l'assassino conosceva la vittima.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un dottorando dell'Università Statale del Michigan scomparve e venne creduto morto. Con l'aiuto di un professore di scienze geologiche, la polizia sperava di trovare del "marcio" sul suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una giovane ragazza venne trovata morta, la polizia arrestò subito il sospetto più probabile. Ma la tecnologia all'avanguardia della NASA permise a un odontoiatra forense di dimostrare che dietro le sbarre vi era l'uomo sbagliato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1993, la giovane madre Tammy Tatum fu trovata violentata e uccisa nel suo appartamento di Longmont, in Colorado. La polizia inizialmente sospettò del suo ex marito, ma non aveva prove sufficienti per accusarlo e il caso è rimasto irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il corpo di una giovane attraente fu trovato a un miglio dalla sua auto abbandonata. La polizia si allarmò particolarmente quando si rese conto che la vittima era venuta da loro per aiuto solo due settimane prima dopo un evento di rabbia al volante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il rapinatore sparò quando la famiglia di quattro persone entrò in casa, uccidendone due e ferendo gli altri. Aprì alcuni cassetti per far sembrare che si trattasse di una rapina, ma la scena del delitto era stata chiaramente preparata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35 anni, venne condannata per l'omicidio di David Nixon nell'aprile 2002 dopo che aveva pianificato di porre fine alla loro relazione.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una donna fu brutalmente uccisa nella sua casa e gli unici testimoni del delitto erano i cani di famiglia. Un esperto di comportamento canino era certo che il killer conoscesse sia la vittima che gli animali e deciso a capire cosa videro i cani.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alla vigilia di Natale del 2005, il corpo di un uomo nero viene trovato bruciato vicino a Baltimora. È poi identificato come Wesley Person, 26enne. I tipici materiali edili anni '30 trovati vicino al corpo sono un ruolo chiave per risolvere il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando il cancelliere Peter Porco non si presenta al lavoro nel novembre 2004, un funzionario del tribunale è richiesto a casa della famiglia Porco a Bethlehem, New York.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: L'assassino probabilmente sperava di coprire le proprie tracce inscenando la scena del crimine. Ma gli investigatori hanno visto il tentativo quasi subito e si sono rivolti alla scienza forense per scoprire cosa è realmente accaduto quella notte.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1986, Gary Dale Larson fu pugnalato a morte nella sua casa a Edmond, in Oklahoma, e poi l'assassino violentò la fidanzata di Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.desc: Uno stupratore seriale era a piede libero in una città in Texas. Nessuno sapeva dove avrebbe colpito ancora.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Gli ultimi istanti della vittima sono su nastro. Sembra trattarsi di una rapina-omicidio. I messaggi sul telefono in un primo momento suggeriscono un amante deluso, ma la polizia trova un secondo sospettato animato dal desiderio di vendetta.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una donna di 20 anni va a fare un giro in bicicletta e non torna più. Gli anni passano senza trovare prove o indizi, fino a quando la nuova tecnologia non risolve il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una famiglia piange l'inaspettata morte dell'amata nonna a Natale. La polizia locale assicura a tutti che si è trattato di un tragico incidente e non di un delitto. Ma alcune cose sulla scena non tornano.

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files II

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Dopo che una giovane madre viene trovata uccisa a casa sua, gli investigatori trovano sul suo cellulare degli indizi sorprendenti che potrebbero portare al suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Il corpo di una giovane donna viene scoperto in una zona isolata. Gli investigatori sono alla ricerca di indizi per identificare lei e il suo assassino.

programme.desc: Negli anni '90, i media soprannominarono Richard Rogers il "Killer dell'Ultima Chiamata" perché prendeva di mira nei locali gay uomini che erano evidentemente ubriachi.

programme.desc: Quando un'insegnante devota e rispettata scomparve, la polizia dovette determinare se fosse andata in vacanza senza dirlo a nessuno o se fosse stata vittima di un crimine.

programme.desc: La vittima era un self-made man che non ha mai usato mezzi termini. Forse è stato assassinato da un cliente o da un dipendente insoddisfatto. Forse le foto audaci nella sua cassaforte contenevano l'indizio per risolvere il crimine.

programme.desc: Nel 2000, l'adolescente Tara Munsey scompare dopo un turno di lavoro in un ristorante della Virginia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una bambina di sei anni è scappata e si è nascosta quando ha visto sua nonna picchiata a morte, ma l'uomo l'ha seguita, picchiata e aggredita. Ha detto che l'aggressore era suo zio, che è stato condannato. Anni dopo ha ritrattato la testimonianza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La scena del delitto era piuttosto violenta: marito e moglie erano stati colpiti a morte in camera da letto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane e attraente parrucchiera fu violentata e uccisa nel suo salone di bellezza. Le prove sul luogo del delitto non corrispondevano a nessuno dei sospettati e, dopo l'indagine iniziale, il caso rimase irrisolto per dieci anni.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Sono rimasti in sette nella cucina di Hell’s Kitchen. Chef Cracco decide di mettere alla prova i concorrenti rimasti in gara introducendo il tema del giorno: i soldi. Chef Cracco invita al Ristorante lo Chef Francesco Mazzei che si presenta con due sacchetti della spesa contenenti 50 euro di prodotti. I concorrenti dovranno cucinare più piatti possibile con il contenuto delle borse, senza sprecare nulla.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Chef Cracco ha convocato i cuochi nel suo ristorante “Carlo e Camilla in segheria” dove apprendono che il tema della prima sfida a squadre è il Giappone. Qui i ragazzi conoscono il Maestro Ikeda Osamo, Chef del ristorante Osaka di Milano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Lo chef Cracco sfida i concorrenti a riconoscere e riprodurre i sapori di un Paese. Durante il servizio serale, devono preparare un piatto non previsto dal menu, presentato da Cracco, mentre la presenza di ospiti d'onore li mette in crisi.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Chef Cracco comunica ai cuochi che oggi il ristorante di Hell’s Kitchen resterà chiuso sia a pranzo che a cena: ogni ristorante ha un giorno di riposo ma solamente chi vincerà la prima prova a squadre approfitterà del giorno libero.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I cuochi affrontano la prova a squadre in coppia, mettendo alla prova le loro capacità comunicative e gustative. I migliori ottengono l'immunità. Successivamente, preparano un servizio romantico per le coppie. Chi sarà eliminato da Hell's Kitchen?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Sono rimasti in sette nella cucina di Hell’s Kitchen. Chef Cracco decide di mettere alla prova i concorrenti rimasti in gara introducendo il tema del giorno: i soldi. Chef Cracco invita al Ristorante lo Chef Francesco Mazzei che si presenta con due sacchetti della spesa contenenti 50 euro di prodotti. I concorrenti dovranno cucinare più piatti possibile con il contenuto delle borse, senza sprecare nulla.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I cuochi si contendono l'immunità mentre aggiungono i piatti dello chef ospite, Gennaro Esposito, al menu del servizio. Gli ospiti del Tavolo degli Chef, protagonisti di Gomorra, complicano ulteriormente la sfida. Le giacche nere vengono consegnate alla fine dell'episodio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: L'arte ispira la cucina di Hell's Kitchen: i cuochi reinterpretano opere d'arte famose attraverso piatti culinari. Nel servizio del pranzo, lavorano insieme in brigata per la prima volta, sotto l'occhio vigile e la telecamera dello chef Cracco per evitare disastri.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Cinque casalinghe si uniscono agli chef per preparare piatti italiani gourmet. Il servizio serale è dedicato alla moda e al glamour, mentre i cuochi si contendono un posto in finale, con l'eliminazione di uno di loro.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy

programme.title: Reading Stories with Pinkfong
programme.desc: A compilation of Aesop's Fables for children

programme.title: Pinkfong Musical Songs and Stories
programme.desc: A compilation of exciting and beautiful stories about different constellation re-made by Pinkfong

programme.title: Pinkfong Children's Fairy Tales
programme.desc: A compilation of children's classic fairy tales.

programme.title: Pinkfong Children's Fairy Tales
programme.desc: A compilation of childrens classic fairy tales.

programme.title: Best Dinosaur Songs
programme.desc: There's Tyrannosaurus-Rex, the best hunter and Pachycephalosaurus.

programme.title: Learn ABC with Baby Shark
programme.desc: Elasmosaurus, Ankylosaurus, Tyrannosaurus, Ouranosaurus, Allosaurus, Baryonyx, Gallimimus, Ichthyosaurus

programme.title: Pinkfong's Snack Time
programme.desc: Friends sent a secret recipe to Little Chef Pinkfong! You can make any snack delicious Shall we learn how to make snacks with exciting songs and rhythms?

programme.title: Jungle Music Festival
programme.desc: You can hear the sound of music in the jungle. Who could be playing? Enjoy an exciting music festival with jungle friends!

programme.title: Baby Shark Tell Me How You Feel
programme.desc: A story about a Baby Shark and his friends sharing their feelings and moods throughout the day.

programme.title: Baby Shark Hospital Play
programme.desc: Welcome to Baby Shark Hospital, where Dr. Baby Shark will take care of you!

programme.title: Baby Shark in Summer Time
programme.desc: A sizzling hot summer! Enjoy a refreshing summer with Shark Family to the tune of cheerful Hawaiian songs that suit the season.

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.desc: Pinkfong and Baby Shark's awesome friend, Hoi, is back! With him, you'll find lots of fun songs and games! Let's have some fun with Hoi!

programme.title: Pinkfong's DIY Guide
programme.desc: PINKFONG Origami is fun and easy, and great for kids’ role-play activities!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.desc: Learn all about safety with Pinkfong Safety Rangers with fun and educational Safety Songs Compilation.

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Pinkfong Super Rescue Team
programme.desc: Hoi Poi Pinkfong! Pinkfong joins the Super Rescue Team! Join Pinkfong and the Super Rescue Team to solve all the cases happening in the city and learn essential safety tips along the way.

programme.title: Baby Shark Doo Doo Song
programme.desc: Every alphabet makes different sounds. Kids will easily be friends with ABCs with a fun alphabet dance along series. Doo doo doo doo doo doo! For all fans who love our Baby Shark songs

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.desc: Help the sea animals from the terrifying plastic animal! Save the environment with Baby Shark!

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.desc: What is waiting for us in Hoi's Playground, today? Visit Hoi's Playground for an awesome play time full of fun songs and learning activities!

programme.title: Super Safeguard Sammy
programme.desc: Help me, Sammy!' Our hero Sammy is here to rescue friends in need! Explore safety tips through lively rhymes and engaging games. Let’s get started!

programme.title: Super Safeguard Sammy
programme.desc: Help me, Sammy!' Our hero Sammy is here to rescue friends in need! Explore safety tips through lively rhymes and engaging games. Let’s get started!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.desc: That shiny crown should be mine...! Billi wants Pinkfong's crown and creates a fake detective test to lure Wonderstar. If Wonderstar wins, they will receive a golden badge but if not, the crown will be gone. The test now begins! Wonder... star? Can you help me dance again? After the record player is broken, Frido can only go hippity hippity hop! Don’t worry Frido, Wonderstar will get your hops to hop!

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.desc: Llia, can you finish your painting this time? There is always one concern for Lyra who is always positive. Something always stops Lila from finishing the pantings. Let's find out what it is with Wonderstar! Billi challenges Jeni, the fastest runner in Wonderville! Jeni VS Billi, who would be the final winner of the running competition?

programme.title: Baby Shark is Trick-or-Treating
programme.desc: Halloween is almost here! You're watching "Baby Shark Brooklyn is Trick-or-Treating! ", a super catchy Halloween songs presented by Baby Shark Official!

programme.title: Baby shark's Transformation
programme.desc: Let's learn colors and shapes with Baby Shark! You're watching "Baby Shark's Transformation", a super fun story for kids to learn colors

programme.title: Clay Baby Shark
programme.desc: Let’s make our friends, the adorable Shark Family! Sing along “doo doo doo” and follow along with the fun clay steps. And soon, the Shark Family is complete!

programme.title: Bebefinn Camping Safety Song
programme.desc: Learn the safety rules to follow at the campground! Don't touch poisonous mushrooms! Don't play near the fire! Have a safer and more fun camping trip!

programme.title: Say Hello to Our New Neighbors
programme.desc: Hello, hello! A new neighbor has moved in! Who could this new neighbor be? And what might they look like? Please welcome the Minjee family, who will be making new friends with the Bebepin family!

programme.title: Baby Shark Hospital Play
programme.desc: Let's go to Dr. Baby Shark's hospital! You're watching "Pinkfong and Shark Family", a super fun story for kids!

programme.title: Baby Shark Special Song
programme.desc: Doo doo doo doo doo doo! For all fans who love our Baby Shark songs, here we are with baby shark songs compilation. Everybody, Let's go and have some fun!

programme.title: Learn Colors with Hogi
programme.desc: Learn colors with Hogi and Wonderville Friends.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.desc: Counting and writing numbers become easy with Pinkfong Number Songs.

programme.title: Pinkfong Dinosaur Songs
programme.desc: Welcome to the Dinosaur World! Here we have all the fascinating dinosaurs.

programme.title: Pinkfong & Hogi: New Friend Ninimo
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. I suoi sogni sono popolati dalle tribù africane e dalle incredibili altre invenzioni descritte su un vecchio libro che apparteneva a suo nonno, misteriosamente scomparso.

programme.title: Il viaggio di Norm
programme.desc: Norm, un orso bianco vegano e ballerino con la straordinaria capacità di parlare la lingua umana, deve lasciare il Polo Nord per raggiungere New York e fermare lo spietato costruttore Sig.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Nocedicocco: Il piccolo drago
programme.desc: Nocedicocco è un draghetto sputafuoco che non ha ancora imparato a volare e che ha anche qualche problema nello sputare il fuoco. L'unico che ha davvero fiducia in lui è il nonno che lo vede come un se stesso giovane. Gli assegna così un compito di responsabilità...

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Cheval mette alla prova la sua nuova forza, ma neanche lui è al sicuro dal Flagello Nero. Lute cerca di rimettere le cose a posto.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute y Cheval affrontan l'incredibile potenza del Flagello Nero, un mostro in grado di spazzare via interi villaggi dalle mappe. Ratha affronta un suo combattimento.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: La battaglia di Lute e Ratha con el formidabile Orrore Nero divampa, ma l'arma segreta di Lute, el potere della Fratellanza, cambierà le sorti della storia.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Rider del Villaggio di Hakum si preparano per indagare sul rapimento di Avinia da parte dei misteriosi Rider Oscuri. Che cosa vogliono da lei?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale, dei Rider Oscuri, attacca Lute per prendergli la Gemma della Fratellanza. Visti i poteri del suo Monstie, la squadra parte per incontrare il Wyveriano, ovvero "L'Evocatore".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Un altro membro degli Ebon Rider minaccia il nuovo Rider del Villaggio di Hakum, mentre Lute e i suoi amici incontrano un vecchio amico e scoprono il "Rito dell'Evocazione".

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Mentre cercano Avinia, Cheval e Cryo si imbattono in un altro Ebon Rider, Shadow, il cui Nargacuga si muove più veloce della luce.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Nariki, stanco da una sessione di allenamento e da una discussione con il suo Monstie, incontra inaspettatamente l'ultimo dei Quattro Sommi Rider Oscuri.

programme.title: Russell Madness - Wrestler a 4 Zampe
programme.desc: Per Russell, un'adorabile terrier, la famiglia significa tutto e farà di tutto per trovarne una – anche salire su un ring e sfidare il campione in carica!

programme.title: Il viaggio di Norm
programme.desc: Norm, un orso bianco vegano e ballerino con la straordinaria capacità di parlare la lingua umana, deve lasciare il Polo Nord per raggiungere New York e fermare lo spietato costruttore Sig.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Bogus - L'Amico Immaginario
programme.desc: Quando Albert va a vivere con Harriet Franklin, l'amica d'infanzia ferocemente indipendente di sua madre, non arriva da solo.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: L'ape Maia il film
programme.desc: Sullo sfondo di una lotta secolare tra api e vespe, la piccola e anticonformista Maia nasce in un alveare dove non è facile essere diversi.

programme.title: Il viaggio di Norm
programme.desc: Norm, un orso bianco vegano e ballerino con la straordinaria capacità di parlare la lingua umana, deve lasciare il Polo Nord per raggiungere New York e fermare lo spietato costruttore Sig.

programme.title: Russell Madness - Wrestler a 4 Zampe
programme.desc: Per Russell, un'adorabile terrier, la famiglia significa tutto e farà di tutto per trovarne una – anche salire su un ring e sfidare il campione in carica!

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Debli è deciso a fare la sua parte nell'operazione di salvataggio della sua amica Avinia e si prepara per il Rito di Evocazione. Aspetta, ma da quando è un Rider?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute sa esattamente quale mostro vorrebbe usare per il suo primo Rito di Evocazione. Nel frattempo, i Rider Oscuri fanno di tutto per trovarlo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: È il turno di Cheval di andare a cercare un potente mostro per aumentare le abilità di Rathi, ma non è pronto per la lunga e fredda traversata delle Distese Innevate di Darj.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Il Tenente Pappan assume il comando di un'indagine sui Rider Oscuri, mentre lui e Lilia seguono una pista verso la Valle Omi.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e Cheval si separano: Lute e Navirou si dirigono verso Borgo Zampa con una piccola deviazione per andare a trovare delle vecchie conoscenze non troppo amichevoli.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Cheval e Cryo vanno nel Deserto Tresed in cerca dei Rider Oscuri e di un po' di pace per Cheval. Ma chi ha ucciso tutti questi mostri?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Mille e Hyoro vengono richiamati al Villaggio di Hakum per partecipare alla tradizionale Monstie Gara con Nariki. Ma un guastafeste scombina i loro piani.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Numeri incontrano Itsy-Bits che li implora di aiutare il Dottor Manelger, ma saranno loro ad aver bisogno del suo aiuto quando apparirà un mostro meccanico.

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: L'ape Maia il film
programme.desc: Sullo sfondo di una lotta secolare tra api e vespe, la piccola e anticonformista Maia nasce in un alveare dove non è facile essere diversi.

programme.title: Il cane pompiere
programme.desc: Il cagnolino più coccolato di Hollywood si perde durante le riprese di una pubblicità e finisce per diventare la mascotte di una caserma dei pompieri locale.

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. I suoi sogni sono popolati dalle tribù africane e dalle incredibili altre invenzioni descritte su un vecchio libro che apparteneva a suo nonno, misteriosamente scomparso.

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: Dubitando Di Thomas - Bugie E Spie
programme.desc: Thomas è un ragazzo conosciuto per la sua capacità di raccontare sempre frottole. Quando s’imbatte per sbaglio in un piano per rapire la figlia del Presidente, prova ad allertare le autorità.

programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: The Art Of Destruction
programme.desc: Founded in 1982, DESTRUCTION is a "Big Three" titan of German thrash alongside Kreator and Sodom. With uncompromising music and high-energy shows, they’ve thrilled millions. Discover the story of a global force that helped define the genre.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S9
programme.desc: Risotto vagone e gnocchi in brodo - Una ricetta molto nutriente ideale nelle fredde serate di autunno o inverno questo risotto vagone e a seguire una ricetta molto originale per gli gnocchi

programme.title: Una pizza in compagnia
programme.desc: La passione per la pizza di Renato Bosco, una passione curiosa e golosa che lo spinge a cercare nuove contaminazioni e nuove sperimentazioni.

programme.title: Una pizza in compagnia
programme.desc: La passione per la pizza di Renato Bosco, una passione curiosa e golosa che lo spinge a cercare nuove contaminazioni e nuove sperimentazioni.

programme.title: Questa terra è la mia terra
programme.desc: Limone - Il limone è sicuramente un simbolo della penisola sorrentina. Peppe ci prepara delle polpette di pollo in foglia di limone, dei rigatoni con pollo alla cacciatora ed erbe, e un piatto gourmet

programme.title: Come è profondo il mare Sardegna
programme.desc: Sant'Antioco ep.2 - Il viaggio di Gianfranco Pascucci in Sardegna alla scoperta dei luoghi dell'isola, della sua gente, del pesce del suo mare e della cucina tradizionale.

programme.title: L'erba del Barone S2
programme.desc: Aglio e ginepro - Nell’angolo aromatico di Andrea non possono mancare l’aglio e il ginepro. L’aglio oltre ad essere un farmaco naturale, è anche un ottimo antiparassitario. Le bacche di ginepro dalle quali si ottiene il gin, vengono usate in cucina per aromatizzare le c

programme.title: Beker on tour S.28
programme.desc: Fabrizio Nonis il nostro beker e griller di fiducia, tra fuochi, griglie e carne, in compagnia dei suoi ospiti, svela i segreti e i tagli migliori per cuocere al meglio utilizzando un BBQ

programme.title: Parola di chef
programme.desc: Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficoltà, aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Mangio tutto tranne Portogallo
programme.desc: Sesimbra e non solo - Giovanni Angelucci, gastronomo viaggiatore, questa volta in Portogallo. Un reportage di gusto e cultura in compagnia di questo coloratissimo paese

programme.title: Il gusto di Igles le origini
programme.desc: Agnello - Siamo sul Po. In questa natura incontaminata nascono grandi prodotti, tra questi la carne di agnello con cui Igles preparerà dei piatti

programme.title: Fuoco Toscana
programme.desc: A fuoco lento - Colline, boschi, vigneti. Una natura che accoglie Max e lo invita a cucinare con il fuoco. Un oasi per staccare dalla vita frenetica della città e tornare alle origini.

programme.title: Giorgione orto e cucina
programme.desc: Calabria - I carciofini selvatici sono una vera prelibatezza calabrese. Giorgione li scopre nel territorio di Altomonte dove vengono raccolti e conservati.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S9
programme.desc: Torta carciofi e ciribolla - Papà Roberto è bravissimo a cucinare la ciribolla, polenta cotta con i fagioli, mentre Lorenzo, Vito e Paola si cimentano in una torta di carciofi con pasta brisè

programme.title: La mia Sardegna

programme.title: L'erba del Barone S2
programme.desc: Zenzero e pimpinella - Le erbe sono una risorsa per la cucina e la salute. Lo zenzero, ad esempio, è antinfiammatorio e energizzante e la pimpinella è un ottimo ricostituente e un toccasana. Una curiosità: il gelato gusto Puffo è fatto con la pimpinella.

programme.title: Giorgione orto e cucina

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: A Moroccan meal in 30 minutes? That's right! Spencer Watts inspires with Moroccan dishes that are quick to make and bold in flavour.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join engaging host, Bianca Osbourne, for a taste of two countries. First stop? Italy! Check out her recipe for succulent wild boar ribs, braised until tender, rolled in gremolata, and served over silky polenta. Next up? A culinary tribute to China, pairing lobster claw with chili oil, pomelo foam, and oyster sauce glazed bok choy. Every episode features a 'common ingredient', this time? It's noodles! Drool over two recipes: Italian classic Olio e Aglio next to chewy Chinese long Noodles tossed with Sichuan Chili Oil. For the big finale, Bianca blends Italian style with Chinese flavour for a one-of-a-kind CombiNation Plate: Kung Pao Pork Osso Bucco over Forbidden Black Rice Risotto... made...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Turkey, think Silk Road spices. Indonesia, lots of seafood and tropical fruits! Curious and adventurous host Bianca Osbourne is your CombiNATION Plates culinary guide through both food cultures. First, check out Turkish Spice Crusted Lamb Rack with yogurt and blistered peppers. Next, an Indonesian tribute: Crab Leg with Coconut Curry. For the 'common ingredient'? Two takes on tender, savoury eggplant! Turkish Eggplant is braised and served with parsley and feta and the Indonesian take is served with fried garlic and sweet soy. For the CombiNATION Plate? Peanut- chili Sate sauce replaces walnut for Pazili TrancÌ§a, a classically Turkish halibut presentation, also served here with unique,...

programme.title: AMSR U Hungry
programme.desc: Dive into a sensory feast with ASMRU HUNGRY: Big Breakfast, a show where a hearty meal of ham, sausage, eggs, tomato, baked beans, toast, hash browns, and coffee take center stage in an auditory experience like no other. Whether you're seeking relaxation, focus, or just a moment of pure indulgence, this comforting show will leave you craving more.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: In this episode of CombiNATION Plates, host Bianca Osbourne starts in Mexico with her version of popular street snack, 'Esquites', re-invented here as sweet corn flan. Next is Norway, don't miss explosively exciting quick-smoked Arctic Char with Forage, you've NEVER seen anything like this before. The common ingredient is tacos! From Norway, 'Lefse' is a potato-flour 'tortilla' served with fresh berries and uniquely Scandinavian 'Brunost' cheese. Representing Mexico, check out spicy pork and pineapple 'Tacos al Pastor'. The Big Dish is Lamb Pinnekjott with Birch Bark Tamale, lamb ribs are seasoned, birch bark is stuffed with masa and veggies, both are steamed over birch branches and boozy...

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts makes salmon and prawns pop with flavor as he works with any seafood kitchen's must-have ingredient: delicious flavored oils.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make brunch for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: blackberry açai smoothie bowls, French toast bread pudding, and Lyonnaise salad with bacon and poached eggs!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make hamburgers with sides and dessert for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: smash burgers, pickle slaw, matchstick fries, and strawberry chocolate milkshakes!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a fresh meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: lamb lettuce wraps, asparagus soup with dill, and apricot turnovers!

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular cake recipes, from hosts like Siobhan Detkavich and Michael Bonacini.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Cheerful host Vijaya Selvaraju shows us how to DIY some of the important staples of Indian cuisine.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks her way from Monday to Friday with four delicious dishes, including a Roast Beef feast and velvety Earl Grey Pudding.

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, steal away to Spain for a summer vacation as host Tiera Singh takes a swing at Paella, complete with sunny saffron, saucy sofrito, and super crunchy soccarat. Next, Missy Hui takes a break for brunch with Chorizo Eggs Benedict - the Saffron Hollandaise is good as gold and twice as bright! Poppy Sandler follows with her Fritto Misto and Sofrito, a delicate and fresh veggie fry-up that soaks up a tomato-spiked sofrito dipping sauce. Micah Trainor finishes up with restaurant-ready Razor Clams steamed in sparkling Spanish wine, served alongside nutty Iberico Ham and sweet Manchego cheese.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.title: One World Kitchen

programme.title: Let's Brunch

programme.title: Let's Brunch

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join Bianca Osbourne to taste and combine! Fun CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne starts this episode with an inspired tribute to Georgian cuisine; Beef Tartare with Tkemali (sour plum sauce), marigold powder, and tart, crunchy pickles. Next; feast your eyes on her unique Hong Kong dumpling: plump scallops, pork, and veggies are blended, rolled, steamed, sliced, and then served with Crispy Yu Choy and XO. The common ingredient is rabbit! Georgia offers up Rabbit 'Mtsvadi', grilled and glazed with pomegranate reduction. Hong Kong represents with Sweet and Sour Rabbit, Grilled Pineapple and Red Pepper Coulis. Finally, Georgian Milk Braised meets Chinese/Hong Kong-style Roast Duck with...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Travel the world without ever leaving the kitchen! Intrepid host of CombiNATION Plates, Bianca Osbourne, starts this episode with Ethiopian inspired Berbere Spiced Quail, seared in aromatic Niter Kibbeh, and served with crunchy-sour Gomen Salad. Brazil is next, check out this re- invention of Feijoada... with braised and seared pork belly, oranges, crema, and fresh black bean salsa. Common ingredient 'Coffee and Sweets' is next... with java-spiked Injera Crepe Cake for Ethiopia and Brazil blending up a dark roast of rich, coffee-spiked, chocolatey Brigadeiros truffles. The final plate is Coconut Crusted Black Cod with cheesy Brazilian-style Pao de Queijo bites, and teff flour a brush of...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne for a trip to Morocco and Thailand! First up, whole Red Snapper is rubbed with earthy Ras el Hanout spice, poached in argan oil, and served with char-grilled oranges. Thailand inspires the next plate; Chicken Thigh 'Lollipop', roasted and served with bamboo shoots, chilies, and sauced with peanut-coconut red curry. Next, these countries both love Spring Rolls... Morocco's version, Briouat, is stuffed with saffron couscous and fresh cheese and fried... from Thailand comes a salad roll with shrimp and mango, dipped in a fiery green Nam Jim. Stick around for the big dish - Saffron buttERS-basted beef Striploin, served with complex Apricot-Green...

programme.title: Malini Angelica Barcelona
programme.desc: Barcelona, Spain, is a city close to Malini's heart. Returning after her student years, she retraces old steps to see how the city has changed. Barcelona, one of Europe’s most visited cities, still holds centuries-old charm. Malina's old haunts include El Gòtic, Sant Antoni, Passeig de Gràcia, and Barceloneta. visits Gaudí’s iconic Casa La Pedrera, and discovers the new wave of creative tapas restaurants in El Raval, a once run-down quarter now bursting with energy.

programme.title: MedMinds 04 Leonardo
programme.desc: Leonardo da Vinci, the curious mind of the Renaissance, embodied genius with an insatiable thirst for discovery.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: The Odyssey Set Sails for Ithaca
programme.desc: Odysseus has been living peacefully with Calypso for seven years. But he's tormented with the memories of the family waiting for him back home, and the Gods want him to go back. He decides to leave, but Poseidon is still obsessed with revenge. His journey back won't be smooth sailing.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: CONCERTO - Federico Fellini 100
programme.desc: From the Rai Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Marcello Rota and featuring soprano Cristina Mosca, celebrates 100 years since the birth of Fellini. The concert features iconic soundtracks composed by Nino Rota for Fellini's films, including La Strada, Prova d'orchestra, and Satyricon.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: MedMinds 04 Leonardo Da Vinci
programme.desc: Leonardo da Vinci, the curious mind of the Renaissance, embodied genius with an insatiable thirst for discovery.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Barcelona

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Carnival Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Step into a world of color, music, and masks as the Mediterranean celebrates its iconic carnivals. Malta Karnival lights up the streets with parades and flamboyant costumes. In Slovenia, the Carnival in Cerknica keeps centuries old traditions alive, and Italy legendary Venice Carnival mesmerizes with elegance and historic pageantry. This is celebration at its most spectacular.

programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini

programme.title: Building for Centuries Panel
programme.desc: What does it take to build something that lasts centuries? This panel examines how sustainability, environmental awareness, and long-term thinking are reshaping architecture and development, moving beyond short-term solutions toward a legacy of resilient, future-proof spaces.

programme.title: Med Minds 05 Plato
programme.desc: Plato, the philosopher of Athens, questioned life, truth, and society, leaving ideas that still shape the world.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: IL Canale du Midi dall Atlantico al Mediterraneo
programme.desc: Peoples, distant lands, and lost civilizations come to life with Alberto Angela. New discoveries unfold with a fresh set design and two new features: a diary from the Pompeii excavations and visits to major art exhibitions in Italy’s museums.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: With its thought-provoking sights, delicious cuisine, and idyllic coastline, it's no wonder Normandy is both a Mecca for history buffs and a popular getaway for Parisians.

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Palermo
programme.desc: Malini Angelica returns to Sicily to explore Palermo, Mondello, and Agrigento. From Palermo’s vibrant markets and rich history to Mondello’s seaside charm and the ancient Greek temples of Agrigento, she uncovers the island’s unique mix of cultures, cuisine, and character that make Sicily truly one of a kind.

programme.title: OSN Kubrick - Musica e cinema d'autore
programme.desc: From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Min Chung, presents a symphonic concert dedicated to the iconic soundtracks from Stanley Kubrick's films. The programme features orchestral interpretations of memorable scores that have shaped Kubrick's cinematic legacy, blending classical masterpieces with evocative film music for a powerful and immersive experience.

programme.desc: Valerio uncovers a shocking truth that deepens the mystery of Ettore’s death. He discovers a conspiracy involving powerful figures, forcing him into a dangerous phase of his investigation. Determined to expose the truth, Valerio faces formidable obstacles that threaten to silence him.

programme.title: Quella cosa che non si scorda mai
programme.desc: Francesco's supermarket is in great crisis and Olivia involves the man in a rescue plan that leads them to search for local producers around Gorizia. Viola is increasingly determined to investigate her mother's past to find out who her father is and Emma is increasingly interested in Nice.

programme.title: The Odyssey Scar of the King

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.desc: In this 2022 concert in Turin, Marc Albrecht conducts the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai, with Simone Lamsma as the violin soloist. The programme includes Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1, showcasing Lamsma's technical brilliance and emotional depth, and Franck's Symphony in D minor, celebrated for its rich harmonies and cyclical structure. The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.

programme.title: Hvar (Stari Grad)
programme.desc: The island of Hvar, Croatia’s sunniest spot, is perfect for enjoying a traditional Dalmatian marenda. In the charming town of Stari Grad, restaurateur Damir Čavić welcomed us with a spread of marinated anchovies, octopus salad, pašticada, cod, and vegetables—washed down with a light bevanda.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: When Rome was little more than a village, Athens was already laying the foundations of Western civilization. And today, amid its rich heritage, Greece’s vibrant capital continues to thrive.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Savor a comforting pork and taro stew, paired with a light and crunchy cabbage, fennel, and apple salad enhanced with walnuts, raisins, and rose honey, a harmony of hearty and refreshing flavors.

programme.title: Whats On Carnival Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Step into a world of color, music, and masks as the Mediterranean celebrates its iconic carnivals. Malta Karnival lights up the streets with parades and flamboyant costumes. In Slovenia, the Carnival in Cerknica keeps centuries old traditions alive, and Italy legendary Venice Carnival mesmerizes with elegance and historic pageantry. This is celebration at its most spectacular.

Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Property Transfer: Protection vs Efficiency
programme.desc: As property markets evolve, the laws governing ownership and transfer must evolve with them. This panel investigates how legal structures can protect buyers and investors without slowing progress, and what reforms are needed to ensure efficient, transparent, and future-ready property transfer across the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.desc: Calabria, a land steeped in myths, reveals its secrets through the Riace Bronzes. Restorer Cosimo Schepis shares the story of these ancient treasures, 50 years after their discovery. Actress Swamy Rotolo and her sister Grecia journey through Calabria, uncovering its hidden gems. A captivating exploration of the myths and legacy of Magna Grecia.

programme.desc: The Mediterranean comes alive to the sound of music. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. programme.title: Jesenice

programme.title: Malini Angelica Palermo
programme.desc: Malini Angelica returns to Sicily to explore Palermo, Mondello, and Agrigento. From Palermo’s vibrant markets and rich history to Mondello’s seaside charm and the ancient Greek temples of Agrigento, she uncovers the island’s unique mix of cultures, cuisine, and character that make Sicily truly one of a kind.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Sukhmani explores Siem Reap, starting with Angkor Wat, a maze of broken columns and statues. She then visits Ta Prohm and then Angkor Thom.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Despite the boom of the 21st century development, Tallinn, the 1000-year-old capital of Estonia, safeguards its UNESCO-listed medieval Old Town, one of Europe’s most complete walled cities. Marco Biagioli and Erica Melargo, a famous Italian nomad couple, lose themselves in its fairy-tale charms, and find out its legends. They also visit iconic attractions such as Alexander Nevsky Cathedral and Raeapteek, the oldest pharmacy in Europe that has continuously been in business in the same building.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in the Seychelles, Freishia finds out that every island has something unique to offer.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Alex is introduced to Tamil Nadu through the state capital, Chennai. A colonial-era cathedral that she visits turns out to be one of the only three known churches in the world built over the tomb of an apostle of Jesus. She also finds out that a museum dedicated to the life of a saint was once used by an American businessman to store ice. She soon realizes that the city is full of hidden stories waiting to be explored.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Israel and first explores Sarona, including its local market, and tries local food and wine. Her next stop is Jaffa exploring its flea market ending with Shakshuka Shushka.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Bengal has not only been home to the former capital of British India but also been the land where many European colonies vied for dominance and cultural supremacy. As a result, the cuisine of the land underwent a renaissance, wherein it imbibed many European influences including Portuguese, Dutch and Danish. Alex visits what used to be a Danish settlement on the banks of the river Hooghly, and she unearths recipes, which were born from this delicious amalgamation of cultures.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Sukhmani explores Siem Reap, starting with Angkor Wat, a maze of broken columns and statues. She then visits Ta Prohm and then Angkor Thom.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Despite the boom of the 21st century development, Tallinn, the 1000-year-old capital of Estonia, safeguards its UNESCO-listed medieval Old Town, one of Europe’s most complete walled cities. programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in the Seychelles, Freishia finds out that every island has something unique to offer.
